title: Count All Valid Pickup and Delivery Options

testcases.input: n = 1 Output: 1 Explanation: Unique order (P1, D1), Delivery 1 always is after of Pickup 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Unique order (P1, D1), Delivery 1 always is after of Pickup 1.

testcases.input: n = 2 Output: 6 Explanation: All possible orders: (P1,P2,D1,D2), (P1,P2,D2,D1), (P1,D1,P2,D2), (P2,P1,D1,D2), (P2,P1,D2,D1) and (P2,D2,P1,D1). This is an invalid order (P1,D2,P2,D1) because Pickup 2 is after of Delivery 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: All possible orders: (P1,P2,D1,D2), (P1,P2,D2,D1), (P1,D1,P2,D2), (P2,P1,D1,D2), (P2,P1,D2,D1) and (P2,D2,P1,D1). This is an invalid order (P1,D2,P2,D1) because Pickup 2 is after of Delivery 2.
